chapter_title.en: The Virtue of Mosques, Their Sanctity and the Reward for Those Who Pray in Them

parts.text: 722 - وَ رُوِيَ: «أَنَّ عَلِيّاً عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ مَرَّ عَلَى مَنَارَةٍ طَوِيلَةٍ فَأَمَرَ بِهَدْمِهَا، ثُمَّ قَالَ

text: «لاَ تُرْفَعُ اَلْمَنَارَةُ إِلاَّ مَعَ سَطْحِ اَلْمَسْجِدِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.722 - It is narrated that Imam Ali ibn Abi Talib (as), passed by a tall minaret and ordered it to be demolished.
He then said: "The minaret should not be raised higher than the roof of the mosque”.
